sn45.21:1.1: Sāvatthinidānaṁ. "Micchattañca vo, bhikkhave, desessāmi, sammattañca. Taṁ suṇātha.
sn45.21:1.2: Katamañca, bhikkhave, micchattaṁ? Seyyathidaṁ – micchādiṭṭhi … pe … micchāsamādhi. Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, micchattaṁ.
sn45.21:1.3:
Katamañca, bhikkhave, sammattaṁ? Seyyathidaṁ – sammādiṭṭhi … pe … sammāsamādhi. Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, sammattan"ti.
Paṭhamaṁ.
